Title: IWS - Verify IWS device works with redundant core system

Preconditions: 1. Verify the IWS device is in "OK" state on the active Core.

Title: 2. Verify sensor data is flowing from the IWS device.

IWS - Verify IWS connects to backup core on active core failure
2. Design with redundant Core pair is deployed.
3. IWS device is on the network, inventory item name matches device name in Configurator.
4. IWS device is in "OK" state on the active Core.
5. Sensor data is flowing normally.
Preconditions: 1. Simulate an active Core failure (power off or network disconnect the active Core).

Title: 2. Wait for the backup Core to take over as active.
3. Observe the IWS device status on the new active Core.
4. Verify sensor data flow resumes.
Preconditions: 1. The backup Core takes over as the active Core.

Title: 2. The IWS device connects to the new active Core.
3. The IWS device reaches "OK" state without manual intervention.
4. Sensor data resumes flowing within a reasonable failover time.
IWS - Verify IWS connects to backup core on graceful switchover
2. Design with redundant Core pair is deployed.
3. IWS device is on the network, inventory item name matches device name in Configurator.
4. IWS device is in "OK" state on the active Core.
5. Sensor data is flowing normally.
Preconditions: 1. Initiate a graceful switchover from the active Core to the backup Core.

Title: 2. Wait for the switchover to complete.
3. Observe the IWS device status on the new active Core.
4. Verify sensor data flow.
2. The IWS device connects to the new active Core.
3. The IWS device reaches "OK" state without manual intervention.
4. Sensor data resumes with minimal interruption.
